text: Being here, I am struck by a sensation of liminality and introspection. The space is clean and slightly sterile, almost as if it is inviting contemplation rather than comfort. The wall labeled "R+D" and the text reflecting on detachment seem to mirror my own sense of being a curious observer, not quite belonging but deeply intrigued by the ideas of innovation and uncertainty. I feel quietly alert, suspended between familiarity and discovery, anticipating what comes next.
